abstract: The importance of the rule relative to others in a rule system’s agenda.
overview:
## Discussion

A [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKRuleSystem] object evaluates the rules in its [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKRuleSystem/agenda] list in order of decreasing salience.

Typically, you set the salience of a rule before calling the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKRuleSystem/add(_:)-76jb5] or [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKRuleSystem/add(_:)-7u5zw] method, so that the system can insert the new rule into its agenda at the proper position. Changing the salience of a rule already in a rule system does not affect its order in the current agenda, but it does affect the order of the new agenda the rule system builds when you call its [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKRuleSystem/reset()] method.

# salience

**Instance Property**

The importance of the rule relative to others in a rule system’s agenda.

## Declaration

```swift
var salience: Int { get set }
```

## Discussion

A [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKRuleSystem] object evaluates the rules in its [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKRuleSystem/agenda] list in order of decreasing salience.

Typically, you set the salience of a rule before calling the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKRuleSystem/add(_:)-76jb5] or [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKRuleSystem/add(_:)-7u5zw] method, so that the system can insert the new rule into its agenda at the proper position. Changing the salience of a rule already in a rule system does not affect its order in the current agenda, but it does affect the order of the new agenda the rule system builds when you call its [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKRuleSystem/reset()] method.
title: salience
